title: Троянский конь — маленькие отмазки
style: Flat minimalist vector mascot style, same character design, proportions, dark teal background and warm palette as the reference image(s). Vertical 9:16, full body, centered, no text, clean bold shapes.

scenes.image: the mortal youth standing proudly on the wall of his small sturdy fortress of discipline, his little flame creature burning strong and bright above the gate
scenes.motion: banners wave gently on the fortress, the flame burns steady and strong
scenes.vo: У тебя крепкая дисциплина. Огонь горит.
scenes.caption: Твоя крепость дисциплины

scenes.image: Dionysus the relaxed god rolls a big wooden trojan horse gift up to the fortress gate, smiling slyly, the horse labeled as a harmless little day off
scenes.motion: Dionysus pushes the wooden horse toward the gate, smiling, the mortal hesitates at the gate
scenes.vo: Дионис катит «подарок»: «Всего один выходной, ничего страшного».
scenes.caption: «Всего один выходной…»

scenes.image: at night little gremlin-like excuse creatures climb out of the wooden horse inside the fortress, wrecking the walls, the mortal's little flame creature shrinking and almost going out
scenes.motion: small excuse creatures pour out of the horse and tear at the walls, the flame nearly goes out
scenes.vo: Ночью из коня лезут отмазки: «ещё разок», «я устал» — и крепость падает.
scenes.caption: Отмазки рушат всё изнутри

scenes.image: Prometheus the bearded titan helps the mortal rebuild the fortress wall, pointing a warning finger; the youth nods seriously, his little flame creature glowing steady again
scenes.motion: they lift a wall block back into place, Prometheus raises a warning finger, the flame steadies
scenes.vo: Маленькая отмазка — это троянский конь. Не впускай первую.
scenes.caption: Не впускай первую отмазку
